name: EVOLUTION PETROLEUM CORP
summary: Evolution Petroleum Corporation (EPM) is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on acquiring and developing oil, natural gas, and NGL assets across a multi-basin portfolio. The company emphasizes maximizing cash flow, paying dividends, and preserving balance sheet strength while managing commodity price exposure through hedging programs and maintaining operational flexibility across commodity price cycles.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Production and sale of crude oil from multi-basin portfolio.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Production and sale of natural gas from operated and non-operated assets.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids (NGLs)
products.description: Production and sale of NGLs as part of diversified commodity mix.
